He is draped in a toga-like garment that leaves his right shoulder and arm bare, highlighting his physical strength. The figure is captured in the act of hammering a piece of metal on a small anvil, holding a hammer in his right hand and the workpiece in his left. The sculpture is set against a stark black background, emphasizing the texture and form of the stone.
